hero.title: Imprint
hero.description: Here you'll find the legally required information about Punishers Germany.

section4.heading: Dispute Resolution
section4.body_prefix: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
section4.body_suffix: You can find our email address above in the imprint.
section4.note: We are not willing or obligated to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
